name: Love Exposure: The TV-Show
original_name: 愛のむきだし 最長版 THE TV-SHOW
overview: The story of a teenage boy called Yu, who falls for Yoko, a girl he runs into while working as an upskirt photographer in an offshoot of the porn industry. His attempts to woo her are complicated by a spot of cross-dressing – which convinces Yoko that she is lesbian – dalliances with kung-fu and crime, and a constant struggle with Catholic guilt. A television miniseries extension of Sion Sono's 2008 tragicomedy.

trailers.title: 映画『愛のむきだし【最長版 ザ・テレビショー】』WEB CM
